negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_cc23ce89-4d75-427d-80d1-bbe4334bb42f
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, likely a car, as seen through the windshield, capturing a t-intersection road ahead and important lane markers: double yellow lines and a faded crosswalk. The scene is set in a rural or semi-rural area under a clear blue sky with some scattered clouds. On the left side of the road, two RVs are parked, one being a white RV with "TIOGA" written on it and the other a larger RV with gray and white stripes. On the front and right sides, important traffic signs: one way sign, stop sign, and a right-turn only sign are seen along with a white utility truck, and a large sign reading "GREAT HIGHWAY 6" is visible. The road itself has a "STOP" painted on it, indicating an intersection where vehicles must come to a halt before proceeding. In the background, there are trees, and a stop sign is visible further down the road. The scene is calm, with no other vehicles or significant activity occurring.  As the video progresses, the white RV labeled "TIOGA" is stationary, slowly exiting the frame to the left. The utility truck remains stationary throughout the sequence, maintaining its position near the right side of the road. The "STOP" marking on the road surface stays prominent, and the surrounding environment, including the trees and stop sign, remains unchanged. The scene captures a quiet moment at the intersection, with no other vehicles or significant activity occurring.  By the end of the video, the white RV labeled "TIOGA" has fully exited the frame to the left, leaving only the utility truck and the "STOP" marking on the road. A person is seen jogging on the right, while another person is seen walking with equipment. Several vehicles are seen on the left of the camera. The utility truck remains stationary, and the rest of the scene, including the trees and stop sign, remains unchanged. The overall atmosphere continues to be calm and quiet, with no additional movement or changes in the environment.
